tasks.title: Dinner
tasks.description: Dinner downtown at 7:30 PM. (Discovered from email: Reservations for Thursday!)

tasks.title: Complete Google OA
tasks.description: Take the 90-minute online coding assessment. (Discovered from email: Google SWE Internship - Next Steps)

tasks.title: Data Structures Project
tasks.description: Complete graph algorithms implementation and write the final report for CS-301.

tasks.title: Apply to SWE Internships
tasks.description: Send out 10 applications for Summer 2027 SWE Internships.

tasks.title: Date Night
tasks.description: Dinner at the new Italian place downtown.

tasks.title: LeetCode Daily Practice
tasks.description: Solve 3 medium DP problems for interview prep.

gmailCommitments.subject: CS-301 Midterm Project Reminder
gmailCommitments.snippet: Hi class, just a reminder that the final graph algorithm project is due on Friday at 5:00 PM. No late submissions.

gmailCommitments.subject: Google SWE Internship - Next Steps
gmailCommitments.snippet: Hi Raj, thank you for your application to the 2027 SWE Internship. Please complete the online assessment within the next 48 hours.

gmailCommitments.subject: Reservations for Thursday!
gmailCommitments.snippet: Hey! I got the reservations at the Italian place for Thursday night at 7:30. Super excited! Don't be late.
